implementationSummary: META-1: Added public-release classifier, releaseEvidencePlan JSON Schema + validator, child-cache schema fields (publicRelease, publicReleaseReasons, issueLoadProfile.releaseEvidencePlan), ensure persistence (including GitHub labels via gh), and Meta gates public_release_classification + public_release_evidence_plan after issue_load_profile. Non-public issues unlock without a plan; public + missing/invalid plan fail closed with missingFields. Label-only public issues classify and cannot unlock without a plan.
assumptions: Body shipping signals require deploy/rollback/smoke/candidate-verification phrases rather than bare 'release' so harness Meta issues remain non-public.
GitHub labels are fetched via gh issue view --json labels during ensure and classification gate (injectable for tests).
Injection of releaseEvidencePlan into readyForExecutor payload is META-2 (#514).
risks: Body keyword heuristics may under/over-classify borderline issues; path triggers remain fail-closed and non-waivable.
Existing child caches without publicRelease fields fail the new gate until meta_prepare --force / ensure refresh.
gh label fetch failure fails the classification gate closed (cannot unlock) — intentional fail-closed.
